narrative:
Jhon Lucumí is a Centre-Back for Colombia, featuring prominently in this World Cup. His overall rating of 7.17/10 places him in the top 4% of centre-backs at this tournament. This strong rating, with a range of 6.83–7.52, reflects both his club form and current World Cup performances.

Lucumí exhibits strong defensive attributes, averaging 0.939 interceptions and 4.322 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. His offensive contribution is very limited, as shown by expected goals of 0.029 and expected assists of 0.009 per 90 minutes in the tournament. This aligns with his club-level attacking output, where he registered 0.027 goals and 0.011 assists per 90 minutes over the last two seasons.

Lucumí plays a crucial role as a defensive anchor for his national team, having played 479 minutes in the World Cup. Scouts should continue to observe his consistent defensive positioning and ability to clear danger in upcoming matches. Fans can expect him to remain a reliable, no-frills presence at the heart of Colombia's defence.
